nasb.text: Now it came about in the third year of Hoshea, the son of Elah king of Israel, that Hezekiah the son of Ahaz king of Judah became king.

esv.text: In the third year of Hoshea son of Elah, king of Israel, Hezekiah the son of Ahaz, king of Judah, began to reign.

cnv.text: 以色列王以拉的兒子何細亞在位第三年，猶大王亞哈斯的兒子希西家登基作王。

ccb.text: 以拉的儿子以色列王何细亚执政第三年，犹大王亚哈斯的儿子希西迦登基。
